title: BBL Routers Facades
description: An addon mod for BBL Routers adding facades to importers and exporters
body:
# BBL Routers Facades

An addon mod for [BBL Routers](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbl-routers) which allows you to set facades on importers and exporters.

![Mod showcase gif](https://i.imgur.com/hokuVie.gif)

## Using the mod

Start by crafting the Facade Applicator.

`Right click` a block to select it as a facade.

`Crouch + right click` the importer or exporter to apply the facade.

`Right click` the air to clear the settings from the Facade Applicator.

When the Facade Applicator settings are clear, you can `Crouch + right click` the importer or exporter to remove the facade.

While holding the Facade Applicator in your hand, you will see a cyan outline around the facaded items.

Facades can only be normal blocks, it can't be a block entity or blocks such as (doors or trapdoors).


# Have suggestions?

If you have any suggestions that you think can improve the modpack, open an issue for it and let's have a discussion
about it.

Or join the discord server: https://discord.gg/7maXVvt2c4
